title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: linux-firmware bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for linux-firmware is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The linux-firmware packages contain all of the firmware files that are required by various devices to operate.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update linux-firmware to latest upstream [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-128447)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for linux-firmware is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The linux-firmware packages contain all of the firmware files that are required by various devices to operate.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update linux-firmware to latest upstream [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-128447)
